name: wms-refactor-lab
description: tmux-backed multi-agent Codex workflow for WMS refactoring.

interface.shortDescription: Run planner, backend, FE, and QA Codex agents in tmux panes.
interface.longDescription: WMS Refactor Lab creates independent Codex panes inside the current tmux session and coordinates planner, plan reviewer, backend contract reviewer, frontend implementer, and QA reviewer agents through serial or barrier-based parallel refactor loops.
defaultPrompt: Start WMS refactor agents in tmux.
Run a parallel WMS refactor loop.
